series_metadata.series_description: Opinions written any time that a piece of real property is sold or purchased by the State of Ohio which serve to determine who holds claims to a property in the State of Ohio and assures that the title is clear of all liens and previous claims. Includes listing of encumbrances on the property and summary of what is not assured by the opinion.
